description_long: This shotgun features a long, cylindrical barrel with a dark metallic finish, complemented by a wooden stock and fore-end that display a rich brown hue and visible grain patterns. The receiver and barrel assembly are robust, with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the main barrel, suggesting a classic design. The stock is full-sized, ergonomically shaped, and appears to be crafted from polished wood, providing a comfortable shoulder rest. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, encasing the trigger securely, while the pump-action fore-end is ribbed for grip. Metal components, including the barrel, magazine tube, and action, exhibit a matte to semi-gloss finish, contrasting with the smooth, slightly glossy wood. The overall build is sturdy, with visible screws and mechanical joints, indicating durability and functionality for urban or sporting use.
description: A long, pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel and a polished wooden full stock, featuring a ribbed fore-end and rounded trigger guard. The design is robust and functional, with contrasting wood and metal finishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and ribbed pump fore-end.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening, tubular magazine below, and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the action and stock contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized metallic trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
